products.name: General Admission 3-Day Wristband
products.description: Ages 13+. Wristbands are good for all 3 days. No 1-day general admission tickets listed in the public scrape.
terms: Resale of tickets is not allowed.
Wristband must stay on for re-entry.
Ticket terms should include filming/photography notice and service-animals-only policy.

products.name: VIP Wristband - Friday
products.description: 1-day VIP wristband with food, beverages, air-conditioned tent access, shade, and private indoor restrooms. VIP parking pass excluded.

products.name: VIP Wristband - Saturday
products.description: Limited-quantity 1-day VIP wristband for Saturday hospitality access.

products.name: VIP Wristband - Sunday
products.description: Limited-quantity 1-day VIP wristband for Sunday hospitality access.

products.name: VIP / Sponsor Package
products.description: Sponsor-ready intake for tailored VIP bundles, hospitality, visibility, and sponsor tier selection before invoice or Stripe Payment Link creation.

products.name: Golf Cart Raffle Ticket
products.description: Raffle ticket surfaced from the public rules page. Keep disabled until finance/legal approval confirms online checkout flow, eligibility, receipt text, and reporting.
terms: Only individuals aged 18+ who are U.S. residents are eligible.
650 total tickets listed in public rules.
Drawing listed for April 19, 2026 around 2:45 PM CDT.
